prompt: Use TDD to implement a Stack class in Python with push, pop, peek, and is_empty methods. pop on an empty stack should raise an IndexError.
assertions: A test for is_empty on a new stack appears before any Stack implementation
Tests cover all four methods: push, pop, peek, is_empty
A test verifies that pop on an empty stack raises IndexError
All tests pass with the final implementation
Tests were added one at a time — no large batches of tests written before the code caught up
